name: The Crushing Lash of Lady Plum Blossom (Secret)

system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Light Melee
Type: Normal
Qi: 6

You lash your fly-whisk around your enemy’s body, causing it to tighten and crush their organs. Roll Light Melee against Parry. On a Success you can extend the lash of your fly-whisk (5 feet per Rank of Qi) to wrap briefly around a foe’s body causing it to tighten and crush for 6d10 Damage each round (beginning this round) you sustain it. On a Total Success you can opt to retain the grip of your lash for a number of rounds equal to your Waijia. To break free from the lash is a Muscle roll against the result of your initial Attack roll. Targets with more Qi Ranks than the attacker can attempt to escape as a free action. Cathartic: This does 6d10 Open Damage plus 3 Extra Wounds. The Damage to the body is also crippling, causing the target to lose 2 Hardiness (Hardiness returns at a rate of 1 per day).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetDrainsNote: Cathartic Hardiness loss returns at 1 per day.
system.catharticEffect: This does 6d10 Open Damage plus 3 Extra Wounds. The Damage to the body is also crippling, causing the target to lose 2 Hardiness (Hardiness returns at a rate of 1 per day).
